home.role: Full-Stack Developer, UI/UX Designer and Digital Communicator
home.description: I combine technology, design and communication to craft standout digital experiences. My approach goes beyond code: I think about impact, message and how to make a brand or product feel unique.

about.title: About me
about.description: I’m a hybrid between web development, design and strategic content. I love building digital products that make sense and communicate well. I’ve worked for startups, agencies and clients who want real results and a clear identity.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of digital products, brands and experiences I have worked on across design, development and strategy.

rumbla.name: Rumbla
rumbla.description: A gamified mobile running app designed to turn the city into a competitive territory through community, progress and motivation.

vikinor.name: Vikinor
vikinor.description: Work focused on visual communication, product specs, marketing assets and corporate materials for an industrial company building technical solutions.

chronocademy.name: Chronocademy
chronocademy.description: Time-based learning platform connecting people through skill exchange.

flowlio.name: Flowlio
flowlio.description: Freelance management platform for clients, proposals and messaging.

ux.description: User-centered digital experiences and beautiful interface design.
